metadata.description: Deployment use cases with endpoint URLs and payloads for AI assistant training. URLs from va_golang_infra_provisionner main.go (default port 8743). Expanded to 135 examples covering 20 intents.

training_metrics.notes: Expanded from 45 to 140 examples for improved coverage across 20 intents.
